lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: Dooooom!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where?

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: All around us! I can feel it in the air, hear it on the wind, smell it... also in the air!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything we can do about this doom?

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: There is nothing you need to do my friend! I am the Doomsayer, although my real title could be something like the Danger Tutor.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Danger Tutor?

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: Yes! I roam the world sensing danger.

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: If you see the signs often enough, then you can turn them off; by that time you likely know what the area has in store for you.

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: If I find a dangerous area, then I put up warning signs that will tell you what is so dangerous about that area.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But what if I want to see the warnings again?

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: That's why I'm waiting here!

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: If you want to see the warning messages again, I can turn them back on for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, I'll remember that if I see any warning messages.

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: You're welcome!

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: Do you need to turn on any warnings right now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: Ok, keep an eye out for the messages though!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will.

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: You got lucky this time, next time doom will be upon you.

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: How can that be? Try again!

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: Spot on!

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: Ah! Here you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: I need you to answer this for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How am I doing hunting those breach monsters, Doomsayer?

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: You've dished out [X] damage to breach monsters. Keep up the dangerous activities! Anyway...

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: Dooooom!

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: Dooooom!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where?

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: All around us! I can feel it in the air, hear it on the wind, smell it... also in the air!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to remove my PvP protection.

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: You haven't got any PvP protection. Doom is already upon you.

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: That way doom lies, I cannot comply. Your protection will be finished in less than 5 minutes.

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: Are you sure? Much doom lies that way and it can not be undone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, remove my PvP protection right now.

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: On your head be it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, arrange for my PvP protection to end in 1 minute.

lines.speaker: Doomsayer
lines.text: Much doom be with you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thoughts, leave it.
